title: Create: Coggle Woggle
description: Update of Create: Coggle to work with Create 1.20.1 Patch 3 (build j)
body:
This is an update to [Create: Coggle](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-coggle) to work with [Create 0.5.1-j for 1.20.1](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric/version/0.5.1-j-build.1631+mc1.20.1)

Usefull rotation propagation until Destroy's Fabric port is complete. This is for the players who want a more advanced building experience with Create. This mod adds 4 new functional blocks, 3 gears and one shaft.

### Planetary Gearset
  * Shaft of a Planetary Gearset rotates twice as fast, and in the opposite direction to the teeth.

### Differential Gear
  * Differentials rotate at the average speed of the two input Shafts.

### Coaxial Gear
  * They have no Shaft, allowing for configurations that would be impossible with regular Cogwheels.

### Double Cardan Shaft
  * Using two mechanisms called 'universal joints', Double Cardan Shafts can relay rotatation around a corner.
